SEARCH
Package sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation

Class PlausibilityCheck

java.lang.Object
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation.PlausibilityCheck
public final class PlausibilityCheck extends Object
Framework for evaluating the morphological plausibility of path operations and reconstructions. Checks come in two tiers:
  • PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck: lightweight checks that run inline during interactive tracing (at fork, segment, and edit hook points).
  • PlausibilityCheck.DeepCheck: heavier checks that scan an entire reconstruction on demand (e.g., overlap detection, global radius analysis).
Both tiers share the same PlausibilityCheck.Warning type and severity model.
Author:
Tiago Ferreira

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.BoundaryProximity
    Flags terminal branches whose endpoint lies suspiciously close to the image's field-of-view boundary.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.BranchAngle
    Warns when the bifurcation angle at a fork is outside a plausible range.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.BundledPaths
    Detects regions where two unconnected paths run parallel to each other for an extended distance.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.ConstantRadii
    Warns when a path has radii assigned, but they are all identical (likely unfitted defaults).
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.Crossovers
    Detects suspicious crossings between paths via CrossoverFinder: X-shape near-coincidences where two paths almost touch.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.DeepCheck
    A heavier check that scans an entire collection of paths for issues.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.DirectionContinuity
    Warns when the child path's initial direction deviates sharply from the parent's tangent at the branch point (potential U-turn).
    static enum 
    PlausibilityCheck.ImpactKind
    Classifies how an error propagates through the reconstruction.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.IntensityValley
    Flags localized intensity valleys along a path's intensity profile: discrete dips of one or a few nodes whose intensity is markedly below the surrounding peaks.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.InterForkDistance
    Warns when two consecutive forks on the same parent path are implausibly close together.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.InvalidRadius
    Flags nodes whose radius is zero, negative, or NaN.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck
    A lightweight check that evaluates the plausibility of a single fork operation (parent + child + branch index).
    static final record 
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    Full distribution of a check's raw measurements across a reconstruction, collected without applying the warning threshold.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusContinuity
    Warns when the child neurite's radius at the fork point exceeds the parent's radius at the branch point.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusJumps
    Detects abrupt radius jumps between adjacent nodes within a path.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusMonotonicity
    Detects sustained radius increases along a path (neurites should generally taper distally).
    static enum 
    PlausibilityCheck.Severity
    Severity levels for plausibility warnings.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.SignalQuality
    Assesses local image signal quality around traced paths and flags those in regions with poor contrast.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.SomaDistance
    Warns when a primary path starts far from any soma node.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.TerminalBranchLength
    Warns when a terminal path is suspiciously short.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.TerminalNearAncestor
    Flags terminal branches whose endpoint sits suspiciously close to a node on a non-ancestor path.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.TortuosityConsistency
    Warns when child and parent have very different tortuosity (contraction).
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.UncertainTerminal
    Flags terminal branches whose final few nodes have low signal/background contrast: the tip's spatial location is poorly determined because the neurite faded into the background before the trace stopped.
    static final record 
    PlausibilityCheck.Warning
    A plausibility warning produced by a check.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.ZExtentRatio
    Flags paths whose Z-extent is implausibly small relative to their length.
